title: Portfolio Filter Configuration
description: Maps application/company slugs to curated case study selections with visibility control.

title.description: Page title for this view. e.g. 'Selected Work'

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle for the portfolio landing.

theme.description: Optional theme override for this view. e.g. 'dark', 'minimal', 'corporate'

id.description: Case study ID matching the case study JSON file.

visibility.description: featured = shown immediately. browseable = behind 'show more'. hidden = only with ?all parameter.

format_override.description: Force a specific format for this case study in this view.

show_all_label.description: Label for the toggle that reveals browseable case studies.
